description: The Magnet Train station connecting Goldenrod City in Johto to Saffron City in Kanto. Requires a rail Pass to board.

connections.note: Post-game only. Power must be restored to Kanto (after Elite 4/Power Plant quest).

tile_layout.notes: Platform/boarding area in upper half. Officer (x=9,y=9) stands at boarding gate checking passes. Gentleman (x=11,y=14) wanders the waiting area. Train tracks at row 4, train doors at row 5. Actual layout from GoldenrodMagnetTrainStation.blk.

npcs.name: Officer
npcs.dialogue_before_power: The train hasn't come in... I know! I'll carry the passengers on my back! That won't work.
npcs.dialogue_after_power: We'll soon depart for SAFFRON. Are you coming aboard?
npcs.dialogue_no_pass: Sorry. You don't have a rail PASS.
npcs.dialogue_have_pass: May I see your rail PASS, please? OK. Right this way, please.
npcs.dialogue_declined: We hope to see you again!
npcs.dialogue_arrived: We have arrived in GOLDENROD. We hope to see you again.
npcs.board_sequence: Officer moves up to train door, player walks up through boarding gate and onto train. MagnetTrain special handles travel.
npcs.arrival_sequence: Player steps off train, officer walks to door, greets player, walks back to post.

npcs.name: Gentleman (Train Company President)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Claims to be the PRESIDENT. His dream was to build a train faster than any Pokemon. Says it really brings Johto much closer to Kanto.

board_train: EVENT_RESTORED_POWER_TO_KANTO (post-game: Power Plant in Kanto must be restored)
PASS item in bag (obtained from Copycat in Saffron City, who gives it after you find her Poke Doll)
requirements.access_building: None — station is accessible but train does not run until post-game requirements met

departure_movement: Officer walks: UP, UP, RIGHT (faces left at train door)
Player walks: UP x3, LEFT x3, UP x2 (boards train car)
MagnetTrain special executes (loads new map with MAPSETUP_TRAIN)
arrival_movement: Officer at Goldenrod station walks to train door
Player walks: LEFT x2, DOWN x4 (exits train)
Officer returns to boarding gate post: LEFT, DOWN x2
travel_mechanics.scene: SCENE_GOLDENRODMAGNETTRAINSTATION_ARRIVE_FROM_SAFFRON triggers Script_ArriveFromSaffron when player steps at coord_event (11,6)

coord_events.description: Triggers arrival sequence from Saffron City. Only fires when scene is set (on arrival from train).

events.description: Train is non-functional until EVENT_RESTORED_POWER_TO_KANTO is set. Officer says the train hasn't come in and jokes about carrying passengers on his back.
After restoring Kanto power and obtaining the PASS from Copycat (Saffron City), the officer facilitates boarding to Saffron's Magnet Train Station.

notes: The Magnet Train Station is a key post-game feature allowing fast travel between Johto (Goldenrod) and Kanto (Saffron). The PASS is a key item obtained in post-game from Copycat in Saffron City after finding her Poke Doll (the Clefairy Doll, obtained from a fan in Vermilion City). The President Gentleman NPC provides lore about the train project. Map dimensions: 10x9 blocks (20x18 tiles).
